age_range.evidence: In an experimental study, parents of teens were randomly assigned to receive a warning message delivered across several channels... Results showed that parents who received the warning from a physician, in comparison to other channels, were significantly more likely to (A) discuss social media with their teen(s) and (B) reduce screen time.

countries.evidence: In the USA, the Office of the Surgeon General has labeled this issue a mental health crisis (Murthy, 2024)...

sample_size.evidence: In an experimental study, parents of teens were randomly assigned to receive a warning message delivered across several channels (e.g. parental control settings, pediatrician communication, online resources).
